title: The Depths of Impel Down: Turning Point
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #13 as the scene develops across pages 12–15.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Looks like we got a newbie....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah, he's no good... he's already...

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: wake up, hannibal!!! what happened here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Dammit, that Okama bastard abandoned us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The escape... used his Okama kempou...

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Ah!! and he was an Okama ...
